commands.review_summary:
The PR marks exhausted embedded provider fallback errors as final lifecycle failures and has the gateway finalize those errors immediately while preserving retry grace for per-attempt fallback errors.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +58. Total +73 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. live reproduction was established for the exact Linux/OpenAI OAuth failure. Source inspection does show the relevant path: current main defers lifecycle errors behind retry grace, fallback-step events can clear pending per-attempt errors, and fallback exhaustion can then return a final failure without a terminal lifecycle marker.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair job is appropriate; the next action is maintainer/contributor proof or an explicit proof override, not an automated code fix.

target.title: fix(webchat): finalize provider failure lifecycle
target.body:
Fixes #91730

## Summary
- Emit a marked final lifecycle error after embedded provider fallback is exhausted.
- Let the gateway finalize that marked error immediately while preserving retry grace for per-attempt fallback errors.
- Cover both the final-failure marker and the immediate gateway cleanup path with focused regression tests.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.test.ts ui/src/ui/session-run-state.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts src/gateway/session-lifecycle-state.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: OpenClaw-native provider failures that exhaust fallback now produce a final lifecycle error signal, so the gateway clears the webchat run and persists terminal failed session state immediately instead of waiting for the lifecycle retry-grace timer.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout `/Users/andy/openclaw-91730-provider-failure` on macOS using the repo Vitest wrapper with hydrated dependencies. The provider failure is mocked, but it exercises the real auto-reply failure mapping and gateway lifecycle handler code paths.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.test.ts ui/src/ui/session-run-state.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts src/gateway/session-lifecycle-state.test.ts`; `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts`; `git diff --check`.

Evidence after fix: `agent-runner-execution.test.ts` verifies the exhausted provider failure emits a lifecycle error with `finalFailure: true`. `server-chat.agent-events.test.ts` verifies a `finalFailure` lifecycle error finalizes immediately, broadcasts an error, clears run tracking, and persists lifecycle state without advancing the retry-grace timer. The existing deferred-error tests still pass, proving per-attempt fallback errors keep the grace behavior.

Observed result after fix: Focused and broader lifecycle/UI regression suites passed locally. The gateway path now distinguishes retryable per-attempt lifecycle errors from fallback-exhausted final failures.

What was not tested: I did not reproduce the exact live Linux OpenAI OAuth `openai/gpt-5.4-mini` transport failure. GitHub Actions and ClawSweeper review are pending on this PR.
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
